caption: Asymmetric (anchored) explicatio (#464). With the Spearmen selected, Shift+B widens the frontage the same way the plain B does, but holds the RIGHT flank fixed and lands the whole widen off the LEFT flank instead of growing symmetrically about the unit's own centre. Ctrl+B is the mirror (holds the left flank fixed). Soldier bodies ease into the reshaped slots at jog speed; nobody teleports.
